metadata.description: Build a durable .context knowledge graph that makes reuse the default and forking a justified exception: map, mine, diff, referee, approve, apply.

plugins.name: crystallize
plugins.description: Builds a .context graph (domains, patterns, component index, decision trees) from your own code; detects semantic duplicate clusters; persists curated judgment only after referee-verification and human approval; enforces anti-fork via /crystallize-guard.
